GitHubApiData.name: SPARK
GitHubApiData.description: Official implementation for the SIGGRAPH Asia 2024 paper SPARK: Self-supervised Personalized Real-time Monocular Face Capture

TranslatedDescriptions.zh-CN: SIGGRAPH Asia 2024 论文 SPARK：自监督个性化实时单目人脸捕捉 官方实现

TranslatedDescriptions.en: Official implementation of the SIGGRAPH Asia 2024 paper SPARK: Self-supervised Personalized Real-time Monocular Face Capture
